reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM
refreeze_reason: The July 23 refreeze binds the corrected 25-case SEC corpus and final ornith:9b pipeline after adding relationship-bound Ask projection, amendment-range retrieval, source-bound lease and service-change facts, and decision-threshold recommendations. The canonical 25-case run measured all 50 Brief and answerable-Ask operations on the reference machine at p50 17.557 seconds and p95 33.082 seconds. The 45-second regression budget and ten-minute first-value contract remain unchanged.
invalidation_rule: Re-measure and re-freeze when the model, prompt scheme, retrieval pipeline, corpus, or reference machine changes.
